rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2306.038 governs designation of an acting director. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The board shall establish a procedure for designating an acting director and shall, with the approval of the governor, immediately designate an acting director or a new permanent director if the position becomes vacant because of absence or disability.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the acting-director provision.
